qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Offside, Argentina. Thiago Almada is caught offside.
Penalty conceded by Stefan Posch (Austria) after a foul in the penalty area.
Delay in match because of an injury Lautaro Martínez (Argentina).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) VAR - Referee decision cancelled at 7'
Penalty missed. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot is close, but misses to the right.
Facundo Medina (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Lisandro Martínez (Argentina).

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lautaro Martínez (Argentina).

Second Half begins Argentina 1, Austria 0.
